description_long: This lamp features a robust, rectangular columnar body with a dark, mottled stone or metal frame and large, inset translucent panels on each side. The panels are a warm, frosted amber color, likely designed to diffuse light softly in all directions. The top of the lamp is open, bordered by the same dark frame, suggesting an upward light emission as well. The frame has a slightly rough, weathered texture, giving it a durable, industrial appearance suitable for outdoor urban environments. The geometric, beveled edges of the panels add a subtle decorative touch, enhancing its modern aesthetic. This lamp is likely intended for use as a pathway or bollard light in parks, sidewalks, or plazas.
description: A rectangular, columnar lamp with a dark, stone-like frame and warm frosted panels, designed for soft, ambient outdoor lighting. Its geometric, industrial style suits urban pathways or parks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular frame with a large, frosted amber panel and beveled edges.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, highlighting the uniformity of the frame and panel design.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, with the same panel and frame details visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the consistent panel and frame structure.
